name: Aether Artisans
description: Premium industrial design studio specializing in bespoke mechanical keyboards, precision-milled aluminum desk accessories, and curated luxury workspace gear. While we sell retail products directly via Instagram, our crown-jewel revenue driver is B2B corporate office workspace commissions (outfitting executive suites or tech startup offices) and custom studio staging contracts for interior designers.
offerings: Artisanal keycap sets and machined aluminum desk trays ($60–$180). Custom hand-assembled mechanical keyboards ($450–$900). Enterprise B2B workspace design and bulk custom hardware deployment (Starts at $3,500 for small executive suites, climbing to $25,000+ for complete tech agency office build-outs—this is our absolute priority).
idealCustomer: Software architects, fintech executives, creative directors, premium interior designers, and fast-growing tech startups looking to elevate their physical office workspace aesthetics for employee retention and brand prestige.
goals: Securing corporate office hardware commissions or multi-desk executive suite consultations is the number one priority. Individual retail sales are a secondary fallback. Content creator collaborations are highly valued, but ONLY if their content is explicitly focused on industrial design, software engineering setups, premium productivity workflows, or minimalist architecture.
commonSpam: Automated 'love your page, let's collab' DMs from fast-fashion, lifestyle, or dropshipping accounts with zero connection to tech or industrial design. Bulk wholesale component suppliers from overseas trying to pitch low-grade plastics/switches, and automated digital agencies trying to sell TikTok growth packages or cold-email scraping bots.
location: Design studio and assembly lab based in Austin, TX. We ship retail products across North America (US and Canada), but our high-ticket custom enterprise on-site installation and workspace consulting is strictly limited to major Texas tech hubs (Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth, Houston).
